MCPLoad Budgeter MCP

Paid remote MCP for context budgets, progressive loading, schema slimming, and readiness.

Website: https://mcploadbudgeter.space/
MCP endpoint: https://mcploadbudgeter.space/mcp
Server card: https://mcploadbudgeter.space/.well-known/mcp/server-card.json
Registry name: space.mcploadbudgeter/mcploadbudgeter-mcp
Auth: Authorization: Bearer <token> after checkout and token claim.
Boundary: read-only fixed tools for MCP context budget; no arbitrary shell, arbitrary SQL, deployment, deletion, or payment configuration tools.
